content.text:
Here is a call to the manySchemasTool tool with valid sample data:

- string: Sample text
- stringMin: Hello!
- stringMax: ShortTxt
- stringEmail: example@email.com
- stringEmoji: 😊
- stringUrl: https://www.example.com
- stringUuid: 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
- stringCuid: cjnk3cz1k000001la9g24r4gl
- stringRegex: test-success
- number: 42
- numberGt: 5
- numberLt: 3
- numberGte: 1
- numberLte: 1
- numberMultipleOf: 4
- numberInt: 7
- exampleArray: ["apple", "banana", "cherry"]
- arrayMin: ["one"]
- arrayMax: ["a", "b", "c"]
- date: 2023-06-15T12:00:00Z
- dateAfter: 2024-03-10T09:00:00Z
- dateBefore: 2024-05-01T09:00:00Z
- actualData: 2022-11-15T00:00:00Z
- object: { foo: "barExample", bar: 123 }
- objectNested: { user: { name: "Ed", age: 27 } }
- objectPassthrough: {}
- objectLoose: {}
- optional: null
- nullable: null
- enum: B
- nativeEnum: A
- unionPrimitives: "testUnion"
- unionObjects: { amount: 10, inventoryItemName: "SampleItem" }
- default: "test"

Let me know if you need anything else!

Here is a valid sample data set that was sent to the manySchemasTool:

- string: Hello, world!
- stringMin: Sample text
- stringMax: ShortText
- stringEmail: example@email.com
- stringEmoji: 😊
- stringUrl: https://example.com
- stringUuid: 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
- stringCuid: cjsmrxmaq0000qzrmn831i7rn
- stringRegex: test-example
- number: 42
- numberGt: 5
- numberLt: 3
- numberGte: 1
- numberLte: 1
- numberMultipleOf: 4
- numberInt: 7
- exampleArray: ["apple", "banana", "orange"]
- arrayMin: ["onlyOne"]
- arrayMax: ["a", "b", "c"]
- date: 2024-05-25T12:00:00Z
- dateAfter: 2024-06-10T09:00:00Z
- dateBefore: 2023-12-31T23:59:59Z
- actualData: 2024-06-15T10:30:00Z
- object: {foo: "bar", bar: 100}
- objectNested: {user: {name: "Li", age: 22}}
- objectPassthrough: {}
- objectLoose: {}
- optional: null
- nullable: null
- enum: "A"
- nativeEnum: "B"
- unionPrimitives: 7
- unionObjects: {amount: 50, inventoryItemName: "Laptop"}
- default: "test"
